message:
feat(panels): add HandlesOwnHeight() to Panel interface

Extend Panel interface with HandlesOwnHeight() bool method to allow
panels using viewport scrolling to opt out of dashboard truncation.

- Add HandlesOwnHeight() to Panel interface
- Add default implementation in PanelBase returning false (backward compatible)
- Enables panels with bubbles/viewport to manage their own height

Part of br-ee3h8 Phase 2c TUI upgrade

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
